improvements: Extract filterHeaders() helper in handler.ts to DRY duplicated request/response header filtering logic (was duplicated in proxyHttp for both request and response headers)
Extract getForwardedRequestHeaders() test helper to DRY 5 identical mock header extraction casts in handler.test.ts

files_not_modified_reason.src/lib/proxy/config.ts: Well-structured constants with appropriate JSDoc. No DRY/SOLID violations found.
files_not_modified_reason.src/app/proxy/[...path]/route.ts: Clean route handler with clear responsibility. Log entry construction has minor duplication but differs meaningfully between WebSocket and HTTP paths - extracting would add complexity for only 2 call sites.
files_not_modified_reason.src/components/external-apps/ExternalApp: Standard React form component. No code quality issues found.
files_not_modified_reason.src/lib/external-apps/interfaces.ts: Clean interface definitions following Strategy pattern. No changes needed.

commit: b1de22f: refactor(proxy): extract filterHeaders helper and DRY test utilities for Issue #395
summary: Refactored proxy handler module to improve code quality through DRY principle: (1) extracted filterHeaders() function in handler.ts to eliminate duplicated header filtering logic that was repeated for both request and response headers, and (2) extracted getForwardedRequestHeaders() test helper to remove 5 identical type-cast expressions in handler.test.ts. No functional or security behavior changes. All 4381 tests pass, TypeScript and ESLint checks clean.
